narrative:
Precinct St Clairsville 3-A (precinct in Belmont County) has 405 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.7%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.7 percentage points.
